text: Njengoba uneBronchitis isibangele ukuthinteka kwemucosa yomphimbo ebesekubanga izimpawu ezinjokukhwehlela kanye nokuncipha kwebronchus.
hypothesis: njengobu nebronkisis isibangele ukuthi nteka kwemucosa yomphimbu ebe sekubanga izimpawo ezi njengokukhwehlela kanye nokuncipha kwebronkais
